name: Crepes I
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the milk, eggs, vanilla extract, and melted butter until smooth.
3. Heat butter until bubbly in a skillet or frying pan.
4. Pour about 1/2 cup of batter into the center of the hot pan, rotating it to spread evenly.
5. Cook until the crepe is light brown on one side, then turn and cook the other side until lightly browned.
6. Spread desired toppings over the cooked crepe and roll up tightly.
7. Sprinkle with sugar if desired.
